requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, and Networked Charger Evidence

summary.en: Namibia does not have a confirmed single public national OCPP platform equivalent to some larger EV markets. For networked public, fleet, retail, hotel, mining, or solar-charging sites, OCPP support becomes a project, operator, or procurement requirement when the charge-point owner needs remote monitoring, access control, billing, fault management, energy reporting, or load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared using IEC 61000-family standards where NSI, NamPower, REDs, municipalities, site owners, or lenders require IEC documentation. Chargers with cellular, Wi-Fi, Ethernet, payment, or metering functions may also need additional site or telecom-related review depending on the configuration.
summary.zh: 纳米比亚尚未确认存在类似部分大型EV市场的单一全国公共OCPP平台。对于联网公共、车队、零售、酒店、矿业或太阳能充电场站，当充电点业主需要远程监控、访问控制、计费、故障管理、能耗报告或负载管理时，OCPP支持即成为项目、运营商或采购要求。在NSI、NamPower、RED、市政、场地方或贷款方要求IEC文件时，应按IEC 61000体系准备EMC及电能质量证据。带蜂窝、Wi-Fi、以太网、支付或计量功能的充电桩，视配置还可能需要额外场站或电信相关审查。
summary.zht: 納米比亞尚未確認存在類似部分大型EV市場的單一全國公共OCPP平台。對於聯網公共、車隊、零售、酒店、礦業或太陽能充電場站，當充電點業主需要遠程監控、訪問控制、計費、故障管理、能耗報告或負載管理時，OCPP支持即成為項目、運營商或採購要求。在NSI、NamPower、RED、市政、場地方或貸款方要求IEC文件時，應按IEC 61000體系準備EMC及電能質量證據。帶蜂窩、Wi-Fi、以太網、支付或計量功能的充電樁，視配置還可能需要額外場站或電信相關審查。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — project or operator requirement for networked chargers where specified
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging, where CCS2 DC communication is specified
NamPower, RED, municipal, site-owner, and project-owner load-management and metering requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle BMS. That protocol is a vehicle-side DC charging communication protocol and is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration. China AC and DC chargers may also use proprietary operator platforms. EMC evidence prepared only against Chinese GB standards may need a clause-level map to IEC 61000 for Namibia projects requiring IEC evidence.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间的通信协议。该协议属于车辆侧直流充电通信协议，不能替代OCPP后台集成。中国交流和直流充电桩也可能使用运营商私有平台。仅按中国GB标准准备的EMC证据，在纳米比亚项目要求IEC证据时可能需要逐条映射至IEC 61000。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間的通訊協議。該協議屬於車輛側直流充電通訊協議，不能替代OCPP後台集成。中國交流和直流充電樁也可能使用運營商私有平台。僅按中國GB標準準備的EMC證據，在納米比亞項目要求IEC證據時可能需要逐條映射至IEC 61000。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication
China GB EMC and power-quality standards used for domestic evidence

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, SIM or network interface, cybersecurity expectations, metering data format, remote load-management functions, and operator back-office test process for each Namibia project. For DC CCS2 chargers, GB/T 27930 vehicle communication must be replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack where required. IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence should be prepared for NSI, NamPower/RED, site-owner, lender, or installer review when specified.
gap.zh: 出口商应针对每个纳米比亚项目确认OCPP版本、SIM或网络接口、网络安全预期、计量数据格式、远程负载管理功能及运营商后台测试流程。对于CCS2直流充电桩，在要求时须将GB/T 27930车辆通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。项目规定时，应准备IEC 61000 EMC及谐波证据，供NSI、NamPower/RED、场地方、贷款方或安装方审查。
gap.zht: 出口商應針對每個納米比亞項目確認OCPP版本、SIM或網絡接口、網絡安全預期、計量數據格式、遠程負載管理功能及運營商後台測試流程。對於CCS2直流充電樁，在要求時須將GB/T 27930車輛通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。項目規定時，應準備IEC 61000 EMC及諧波證據，供NSI、NamPower/RED、場地方、貸款方或安裝方審查。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — mandatory where required by the charge-point operator, site owner, tender, fleet, lender, NamPower/RED load-management review, or procurement specification; IEC 61000 evidence is expected where IEC EMC documentation is specified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-communication baseline and is not an OCPP back-office or CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Namibia, OCPP is usually a project and operator integration requirement rather than a confirmed single national platform rule. GB/T 27930 does not satisfy OCPP or CCS2 communication needs, and IEC 61000 EMC evidence should be prepared when the project requires IEC documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对纳米比亚而言，OCPP通常是项目及运营商集成要求，而非已确认的单一全国平台规则。GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP或CCS2通信需求；项目要求IEC文件时应准备IEC 61000 EMC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對納米比亞而言，OCPP通常是項目及運營商集成要求，而非已確認的單一全國平台規則。GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP或CCS2通訊需求；項目要求IEC文件時應準備IEC 61000 EMC證據。
